title: Two-Factor Authentication
drDigitalIntro:
Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds a second check after your password.
• Usually a one-time code sent to your phone.
• Even a stolen password won't get someone in without your phone.
• Turn it on for email, banking, and social media.

playgroundTask.goal: You logged in with two-factor authentication

steps.say: Click Login — a 2FA code will be sent to your phone.
Click Verify to complete the 2FA check.

drDigitalSuccess: You used two-factor authentication! Even with your password, hackers need your phone too.
drDigitalHint: Log in first, then enter the code that appears on the 2FA screen.
